title: gonocarpus teucrioides
intro: Gonocarpus teucrioides, also known as the tea tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Haloragaceae. It is native to Australia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues such as respiratory infections, wounds, and skin conditions due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting healing. The herbal preparation of Gonocarpus teucrioides is often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to aid in the relief of various health conditions.
